name: MSP Recovery, Inc.
summary: PART I . Industry Overview Our business is directly related to the healthcare industry and is affected by healthcare spending and complexity in the healthcare data industry. The market for healthcare data and healthcare claims recovery solutions is large and growing. We estimate that our total potentially serviceable market is over $161.5 billion annually.
